title: sorocea muriculata subsp. muriculata
intro: Sorocea muriculata subsp. muriculata, also known as the muriculated sorocea, is a plant species within the family Moraceae. It is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
